description: Style Note ganuchi gives you a high fashion shoe with this pair. Wear it for that stylish touch to your outfit and give your entire look a classy addition with this pair. Product Details Square toed black shoes with stitched detail around the toe box and midfoot region Leather upper with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue and branding on the side Reinforced inlay at the heel collar Soft footbed Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine
